_meta.description: Single source of truth for known aggregator/scam domains that should NEVER appear as apply URLs on the public site. Imported by both lib/aggregatorHosts.ts (TS, server-side) and crawlers/aggregator_hosts.py (Python, crawlers). Hosts here are auto-rejected at opportunity insert time.

_meta_notes: ec.europa.eu / eacea.ec.europa.eu are EU portal indexes — they point AT opportunities but are not opportunity application pages themselves. Discoverer should look through them to find consortium URLs.
findaphd.com is on this list because it's an aggregator that fronts opportunities behind a paywall/email-gate; the underlying university page is the right apply URL.
Social media hosts ban any apply_url that's a Facebook/LinkedIn share rather than an official page.
